original_text: "Certifying agent" means an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations.
P: an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations
ig_script_full: E(certifying agent) F(means) P(an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations).
notes: Definitional constitutive statement. Context implied (general/always). Named entity rule: Secretary not decomposed.

original_text: "Organic operation" means a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products.
P: a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products
ig_script_full: E(organic operation) F(means) P(a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products).
notes: Definitional constitutive statement. Constituting Properties include disjunctive elements (produces or handles) kept intact as part of the definition.

original_text: "National Organic Standards Board" (NOSB) means the advisory board established to assist the Secretary.
P: the advisory board established to assist the Secretary
ig_script_full: E(National Organic Standards Board) F(means) P(the advisory board established to assist the Secretary).
notes: Definitional constitutive statement. Named entity (National Organic Standards Board) coded as full Constituted Entity per named-entity rule.

original_text: A producer of an organic operation must apply for certification with an accredited certifying agent annually.
ig_script_full: A,p(of an organic operation) A(producer) D(must) I(apply for certification) Bind(accredited certifying agent) Cex(annually).
notes: "with an accredited certifying agent" treated as indirect object (recipient of the certification application). Cex=annually is a temporal execution constraint.

original_text: Certified organic farmers must not apply synthetic chemicals to crops at any time once organic certification is conferred, or else the certifying agent will revoke certification from the farmer.
O: A(certifying agent) D(will) I(revoke) Bdir(certification) Bind(farmer)
ig_script_full: A,p(Certified organic) A(farmers) D(must not) I(apply) Bdir(synthetic chemicals) Bind(crops) Cac(once organic certification is conferred) Cex(at any time), O{A(certifying agent) D(will) I(revoke) Bdir(certification) Bind(farmer)}.
notes: Cac="once organic certification is conferred" is event-based activation condition. Cex="at any time" qualifies temporal scope of prohibition. Or else is vertically nested regulative statement. "to crops" treated as indirect object.

original_text: Upon receiving a certification application, the certifying agent must inspect the applicant's operation within 60 days.
ig_script_full: Cac(Upon receiving a certification application) A(certifying agent) D(must) I(inspect) Bdir(applicant's operation) Cex(within 60 days).
notes: Cac is event-triggered ("upon receiving"). Cex is a temporal execution constraint. Classic Cac + Cex structure.

original_text: Inspectors must sign and file farm inspection reports following each site visit. [decomposed: sign]
ig_script_full: A(Inspectors) D(must) I(sign) Bdir(farm inspection reports) Cex(following each site visit).
notes: Decomposed from compound aim "sign and file" (Rule 2.4). S7a [AND] S7b. Cex is temporal execution constraint.

original_text: Inspectors must sign and file farm inspection reports following each site visit. [decomposed: file]
ig_script_full: A(Inspectors) D(must) I(file) Bdir(farm inspection reports) Cex(following each site visit).
notes: Decomposed from compound aim "sign and file" (Rule 2.4). Paired with S7a [AND] S7b.

original_text: Certifiers and inspectors must seek accreditation renewal every three years. [decomposed: Certifiers]
ig_script_full: A(Certifiers) D(must) I(seek) Bdir(accreditation renewal) Cex(every three years).
notes: Decomposed from compound attribute "Certifiers and inspectors" (Rule 2.5). S8a [AND] S8b. Cex is temporal.

original_text: Certifiers and inspectors must seek accreditation renewal every three years. [decomposed: inspectors]
ig_script_full: A(inspectors) D(must) I(seek) Bdir(accreditation renewal) Cex(every three years).
notes: Decomposed from compound attribute "Certifiers and inspectors" (Rule 2.5). Paired with S8a.

original_text: When an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act, a written notification of noncompliance shall be sent to the certifying agent.
Cac: When an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act
ig_script_full: Cac(When an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act) A([Program Manager]) D(shall) I(send) Bind(certifying agent) Bdir,p(written) Bdir(notification of noncompliance).
notes: Passive construction converted to active. Actor [Program Manager] inferred from context. Cac is event-triggered. Bdir,p=written is a property of the notification object.

original_text: Any operation that knowingly sells or labels a product as organic, except in accordance with the Act, shall be subject to a civil penalty. [decomposed: sells]
A_prop: that knowingly sells a product as organic
Cex: except in accordance with the Act
ig_script_full: A,p(that knowingly sells a product as organic) A(operation) D(shall) I(be subject to) Bdir(civil penalty) Cex(except in accordance with the Act).
notes: Decomposed from compound "sells or labels" (Rule 3.2). S10a [OR] S10b. "except in accordance with the Act" is an execution constraint (carve-out condition). Actor property captures the qualifying behavioral condition.

original_text: Any operation that knowingly sells or labels a product as organic, except in accordance with the Act, shall be subject to a civil penalty. [decomposed: labels]
A_prop: that knowingly labels a product as organic
Cex: except in accordance with the Act
ig_script_full: A,p(that knowingly labels a product as organic) A(operation) D(shall) I(be subject to) Bdir(civil penalty) Cex(except in accordance with the Act).
notes: Decomposed from compound "sells or labels" (Rule 3.2). Paired with S10a [OR] S10b.

original_text: A certifying agent whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section may at any time submit a request for reinstatement of its accreditation.
A_prop: whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section
Bdir: request for reinstatement of its accreditation
ig_script_full: A,p(whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section) A(certifying agent) D(may) I(submit) Bdir(request for reinstatement of its accreditation) Cex(at any time).
notes: Permission statement. Actor property encodes the qualifying condition on the actor (suspended accreditation). Cex="at any time" is an unrestricted temporal execution constraint. Embedded passive clause captured as actor property at IG Core; at IG Extended would be component-level nested statement.
